mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS id, s.member_id AS member_id, m.name AS member_name, s.plan_id AS plan_id, p.name AS plan_name, p.grade AS plan_grade, s.status AS status, s.cycle_no AS cycle_no, s.billing_key_masked AS billing_key_masked, s.next_billing_at AS next_billing_at, s.started_at AS started_at FROM SUBSCRIPTION s JOIN MEMBER m ON s.member_id = m.id JOIN SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN p ON s.plan_id = p.id
ORDER BY ${orderBy} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SUBSCRIPTION s JOIN MEMBER m ON s.member_id = m.id

SELECT s.id AS id, s.member_id AS member_id, m.name AS member_name, s.plan_id AS plan_id, p.name AS plan_name, p.grade AS plan_grade, p.price AS plan_price, p.period_months AS plan_period_months, s.billing_key_masked AS billing_key_masked, s.status AS status, s.cycle_no AS cycle_no, s.next_billing_at AS next_billing_at, s.started_at AS started_at, s.canceled_at AS canceled_at, s.created_at AS created_at, s.updated_at AS updated_at FROM SUBSCRIPTION s JOIN MEMBER m ON s.member_id = m.id JOIN SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN p ON s.plan_id = p.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
